header.location: Portland, OR (Open to Remote or Relocation)

summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) People Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve onboarding and customer experience—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Guide customers and stakeholders through {coord|onboarding} milestones across 20+ programs, reducing onboarding time by 75% via clear documentation
Identify customer needs and execute outreach that yields an average of 40+ new leads monthly, building consultative product expertise
Deliver live {prog|training} and webinars for 600+ participants, driving product understanding and a 78% program enrollment rate
Use {data|AI tools} for communications and feedback analysis, collaborating across {cross|Marketing, Tech, and Sales} teams to improve workflows
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery and stakeholder interviews to diagnose drivers and recommend evidence-based solutions
Upskill the client team in {data|data analytics} to audit 300+ cases, refuting cost assumptions via evidence-based insights
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
Analyzed 2,000+ {ex|customer/employee experiences} to amplify voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Optimized {coord|onboarding processes} across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying responsibilities
Piloted an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Directed a Merger & Acquisition project, migrating and merging employee records across systems
Strengthened engagement via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

changeLog: 2026-05-30: Tailored for Gusto — Jr. Onboarding Associate (Denver/Chicago/LV/Phoenix remote → Portland header, remote-eligible). Summary → People Program Manager, onboarding/customer-experience flavor. InGenius → onboarding-milestone guidance + customer needs/40+ leads monthly (consultative-selling resonance) + live training + AI tools for comms (JD requires day-to-day AI integration). Reordered to lead with onboarding. ODN → Pair A/diagnostic mix. NextGen → 'customer/employee experiences'. Vestas → onboarding lead. Skills → CRM (HubSpot) surfaced for sales-onboarding fit, AI tools kept, dropped HRCI/LMS. NOTE: entry-level sales/CS onboarding role with quota/cross-sell focus — Jamie is over-qualified on program side but lighter on quota sales; truthful overlap on onboarding, consultative service, AI fluency, customer empathy.
